arts.sum: Chelsea will be bidding to avoid ending a club-record streak when they square off against Fulham in the Premier League encounter at Craven Cottage on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Maresca must make seven Chelsea changes vs Fulham after Legia Warsaw defeat
arts.sum: While Palmer was kicked about a lot by the Legia players, you would still expect the 22-year-old, as well as Jackson and Cucurella, to be in the starting line-up against Fulham. With the Blues leading 3-0 heading into the second leg at Stamford Bridge, Maresca started the likes of Cole Palmer, Nicolas Jackson and Marc Cucurella despite there being less than three days before a crucial Premier League trip to Fulham.
